title: suneudokeo #4909
definition:
1) to be pleased together with, to approve together (with others)
 2) to be pleased at the same time with, consent, agree to
    2a) to applaud
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be pleased together with, to approve together (with others)
 2) to be pleased at the same time with, consent, agree to
    2a) to applaud

    NASB:  to join in approving:
